system.description: Put your best foot forward. Change something about your outfit and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the next time you enter a room, you’ll appear to everyone inside as the person they most want to see right now, as a group. It may be a specific person, or a type of person (plumber, bassist, environmentalist, president, etc.) You don’t gain a supernatural sense of your appearance, and must piece it together through context clues. This effect lasts until you leave the room.
outcomes.failure: you become the person they most want to see and the effect lasts until the next time you sleep. Everyone will think you are that person or type of person, and you may not even know what it is. Likely to create Loose Ends if you are a copy of a specific person or don’t have the skillset for the type of person you became.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you may choose one at any time while this effect is active:
  • Ask the GM (or controlling player) a direct question about what someone nearby wants from you and receive an honest answer.
  • Suddenly have the perfect tool to fulfill a request made of you by the people in the room.
  • Enter another room without dropping the effect.
outcomes.triscendence: you literally become the person they're looking for. You feel like an observer/pilot in their mind who can nudge their behavior, but without any input you will act exactly like them.
